app_user_contact_present.name: app_user_contact_present
app_user_contact_present.value: "app_user"."email" is not null or "app_user"."phone_e164" is not null

project_planned_dates_check.name: project_planned_dates_check
project_planned_dates_check.value: "project"."planned_end_at" is null or "project"."planned_start_at" is null or "project"."planned_end_at" >= "project"."planned_start_at"

task_ai_source_item_key_check.name: task_ai_source_item_key_check
task_ai_source_item_key_check.value: "task"."source" <> 'AI_CONFIRMED' or ("task"."source_ai_suggestion_id" is not null and "task"."source_ai_item_key" is not null)
